Example

Enum PrescriptionModifier

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types.dll

Prescription modifier.

public enum PrescriptionModifier

Fields

PrescriptionModifierAtLeast = 0

At least.

PrescriptionModifierAtMost = 1

At most.

PrescriptionModifierDMax = 20

Dose received at the DMax depth.

PrescriptionModifierEUD = 6

EUD.

PrescriptionModifierIsodose = 40

Dose received by an isodose line.

PrescriptionModifierMaxDose = 3

Maximum dose.

PrescriptionModifierMaxDoseAtMost = 10

Maximum dose at most.

PrescriptionModifierMeanDose = 2

Mean dose.

PrescriptionModifierMeanDoseAtLeast = 7

Mean dose at least.

PrescriptionModifierMeanDoseAtMost = 8

Mean dose at most.

PrescriptionModifierMidPoint = 21

Dose received at the midpoint depth.

PrescriptionModifierMinDose = 4

Minimum dose.

PrescriptionModifierMinDoseAtLeast = 9

Minimum dose at least.

PrescriptionModifierNone = 99

Undefined.

PrescriptionModifierRefPoint = 5

Reference point.

PrescriptionModifierUser = 22

Dose received at a user-defined depth.
